title: Hot Wheels Collectibles 1:18 Scale
summary: This premium series of detailed castings were produced in 1999 & 2000.

title: 100% Hot Wheels 1:18 Scale
summary: 100% Hot Wheels was a premium series of detailed castings that started in 2001. Including a line of 1:18 scale cars, 1:10 & 1:18 scale motorcycles, listed on this page. In 2002 a series of 1:18 scale tuner cars with extra parts for customization was released, for those see Tunerz.

title: Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series (2012)
summary: The Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series was released exclusively at Target stores in 2012. All castings in this series are all 2011 and 2012 mainline releases on a specially designed card by the picks of the four driver teams. Each vehicle comes with a sticker sheet consisting of the Team Hot Wheels logo and the team color icon.

title: Jr Sang
summary: Jr Sang is a freelance artist and graphic designer who has been working with Hot Wheels under internship since 2026 after randomly applying to a position of interest who aspires to work full-time under the brand; his first day was June 1. Sang designed the “America 250th Anniversary” livery that debuted on the full size Deora II show car build announced on June 18, 2026....

title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Oversized
summary: right|200pxHot Wheels Monster Trucks Oversized is a sub series of Hot Wheels Monster Trucks first launched in 2018. This line features 1/24 scale versions of various Monster Truck models; they feature a special package design which can be used as a display case. The series gained its current name in 2021; prior to then, the series was simply known as Monster Trucks 1:24 Scale Trucks.

title: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Big Rigs
summary: Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Big Rigs are a series of multi-axled car carrier vehicles intended to be compatible with Hot Wheels Monster Trucks. This series was conceived by Brendon Vetuskey and Gabriel De La Torre, with design work done by Omar González.

title: List of 2026 Hot Wheels (by Series)
summary: For 2026, the Hot Wheels mainline is numbered 1 through 250 with color variations not receiving a new number. Treasure Hunts and store exclusives are numbered. For the listing by series see List of 2026 Hot Wheels.
